Gaudralek, Sword of the Sky  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 43 Dmg Bonus: 136 AC: 50
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
HP: +100
Effect: Rage of the Sky (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 55
WT: 9.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Gaudralek, Sword of the Sky
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 43 Dmg Bonus: 136 AC: 50
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
HP: +100
Effect: Rage of the Sky (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 55
WT: 9.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Mavik
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-12 08:20:22
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Lord Vyemm


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded February 1st, 2022 by halfridge

Post Comment
I am returning from some time off......
QuoteReply
# Feb 29 2024 at 2:50 PM Rating: Decent
Denaddor
Scholar
23 posts
I am a warrior that had this weapon back in the day.... I would like it again.... if only for the graphic..... Not sure I could go get the higher end one on my own... but lil Lord Vyemm might have to have a visit from me...... I am not sure what happened to my old one.... might be packed up in my house that was reclaimed LOL. Hell Id pay a RL Smithy to make this sword for me... it has the UBEREST graphic....... The day I was granted this weapon from my guild i stood up and cheered my *** off....... used it for years

# Jun 15 2004 at 11:57 PM Rating: Default

this weapon has eq's most uber weapon graphic imho
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 21 2004 at 1:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) if u want to be Mr. DPS?, look-at-me-i-hit-ubar-fast.. and if u want to be a warrior at the same time.. who are you and why havent you ben shot yet? MONK GOOD and ROGUE GOOD are strictly DPS.. WARRIOR BAD for thoes of you who dont under stand the traffic signals and the middle finger.. ive made this especialy easy.. just read the bold writings..
RE: DPS?
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2004 at 7:07 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591783493403
131 posts
Let's check boy

This weapon is raid quality weapon.
Not high level (ssra, PoP, GoD) raids, but still raids

How many main tanks (agro holders) do you need in this kind of raids?
2, maybe 3 from time to time

And what happens if your 3 other warriors all have only agro weapon and no dps weapons? they're useless, they wont do sh*t.
Not every warrior get the best dps AND best agro from the same weapon setup, so some need both

Edited, Tue Mar 30 07:06:03 2004
▲ Page top
RE: DPS?
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2004 at 3:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591806508461
7 posts
A very decent weapon... not complete on aa's am I, but often hits high 200's for me and double hits at that. Also, proc "Rage of the Sky" is unresistable with a stun ... try that for DD based weaponry. With CF1, all defensive aa's, max strength (305), and 280ish Dex I get max crit hits around 480 ... not a bad weapon. Used it in most of the plains (Earth, Air, Water, Fire) and never had proc resisted. Bear in mind that this isn't a weapon an MA would use, most would prefer a BoW (Blade of War -- off RZ in Tactics), then again.. I'm not an MA =)
▲ Page top
RE: DPS?
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2004 at 2:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591806508461
7 posts
still using this badboy.. not the greatest on stats, still very decent damage.. high end crits reaching 500's ..with 325 - 330ish combat stats.. the stun still helps with agro, also have Anger III aug in it.. not a mainline tank weapon.. but has served me well all this time. Crippling blows reaching high 800's with this (berzerk, with mightystrike disc going) .. still only running PB2 (need to complete 3) .. but more often hitting for high 200's with most hits being around 330 ... still a very decent weapon. Have noticed 1k+ damage combat rounds with it, certainly not gonna complain.. three 300'ish hits and a sub 200ish all in one combat round (PB2, Flurry2 or 3).

And, yes... awsome graphic as always.

Edited, Mon Dec 13 02:32:43 2004
▲ Page top
2H tankage
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2003 at 11:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257688383
8 posts
i placed an anger II proc on this 2H and i will NEVER duel wield while taking ever again ....... once u get PB3 AA and the right dmg mitigation i dunt care if u use defensive proc.... u still will get dps...... im planning to place anger III on epic 2H and see the results from that but man is it lovely having groups that want u 2 tank cuz u take less dmg then DW tanks....... and can hold agro 2 boot

Vicatatious Rageslayer
65 Human Overlord (1 of only 5 Human overlords)
on Firona Vie server
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2003 at 9:32 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) definitly not the best but a wicked 2 hander definitly wicked -( cool name)
damage
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2003 at 6:22 PM Rating: Good
Dalarek
View User Forum
267 posts
The problem with 2hander vs 2x1hander is not damage, and not taunt. The problem is riposte. When ya hit a mob, he has a chance of hitting you back, if you're attacking from the front.

If you are a warrior, chances are you are attacking from the front. If you use a weapon combo that deals a bit more damage, but hits the mob 5x as frequently, youll hafta deal with 5x as many ripostes as using a high damage high dly 2hander. THAT is why 2handers > DW at high lvls, NOT taunt and NOT damage.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 23 2003 at 4:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) U R Crazy..........
RE: damage
QuoteReply
# May 02 2003 at 10:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1649292544618
Scholar
92 posts
He's 100% correct.

The amount of reposte damage you eat while using this sucker vs. blazing away with 2 sub-20 delay 1 handers is significant. Especially when the crap you're tanking repostes for like 1k a pop.

DPS, unresistable proc...this is a sweet blade. I switched from a willsapper/fleshgrinder to Gaudralek a few weeks ago, and it's holding aggo just as well if not better than my 1-handed setup. And adding considerably more DPS as well.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 08 2003 at 4:23 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The delay on the off hand wepon dose not effect ho ofton it will hit just primary.
RE: damage
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2003 at 6:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252901446
183 posts
Incorrect sir. Offhand goes off its own delay.
Everyime its delay comes up it checks against dual wield to swing. Has nothign to do with primary weapon.
▲ Page top
RE: damage
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2003 at 6:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362421568
45 posts
actually, he has a very good point. using a 2hs over DW combo will save the cleric 1 or 2 CHs if you are tanking in a tier 2 + POP or other high lvl raid encounters per fight. also, many 2hs weps (such as windblade) can outdamage many DW combos. not all, but many, AND saving on riposte damage at the same time. that is why 2hs rocks, and DW doesnt rock (if you are a MT)

my 2cp

-Partil
57 Ranger
Torvonnilous

RE: damage
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2003 at 5:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592345864859
Scholar
377 posts
I have to agree but this is only relevant for maybe 2 % of the all warriors who play EQ cause only those will face mobs who riposte for so much damage that every single riposte is one too much and only those will be able to get a good aggro proccing twohander like the one dropping off Rallos Zek.

For the vast majority of warriors, DW > 2handers and always will be.

Edited, Fri Aug 22 05:58:48 2003
▲ Page top
RE: damage
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2004 at 11:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773287619
Scholar
20 posts
I may be stepping out on a limb here, but I'm assuming if you are looking at looting this sword, you are in a raiding guild and taking down mobs like the one that drops this sword, and hence face mobs that hit for 1k+.

In other words, even if I were to accept that it's only good for 2% of warriors (which I don't), it should be good for 100% of the warriors that will have a chance to loot it.
▲ Page top
RE: damage
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2003 at 2:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1649292544618
Scholar
92 posts
Um No. Taking less damage is relevant for every warrior, not 2%.
Doesn't matter if the mob repostes for 200 or 2000. If you can find a 2-hander that you can maintain aggro with, take that over DW any day of the week. This blade is such a weapon.
▲ Page top
2 handers
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2002 at 8:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343534599
4 posts
I'm a high level war, and although it is true most wars weild 1 handers at the higher levels, it also depends on if you are a Main Tank, and when your turn to MT is on a mob. I have found that some of my 2 handers can aggro a mob off a duel weilding , taunting war. It is true that proximaty and facing of the mob does have an effect on aggro. I have to admit tho, I lub 2 handers and always will, so this might slant my take on the situation.
▲ Page top
description and comments on quality
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2002 at 4:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756975845
Scholar
31 posts
Blade shape is similar to the High Elf Paladin obtainable 2HS weapon from the Plane of Growth (Nature's Defender?). The Blade is thick but unlike the Pally sword, this one only has a few runes which are thick and progress 3/4 of the way up the sword. It's a great sword.

As far as it being "worthless" or "crap" compared to Primal weapons or things on FoH's site, that's a bunch of hooey. A level 60 warrior who has a primal warsword (which is 1HS) will also have a Dex high enough so that it procs very often (3-6 times per minute). During long fights, a lot of melee will switch out their primal (because the ratios and +stats aren't THAT spiffy) and equip a weapon like this to do the most damage possible while Avatar is in effect (6 minutes), and then switch back before Avatar runs out until their primal procs again.

It's a great sword, one of Vyemm's better loots.
▲ Page top

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 24 2001 at 4:31 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I am rating all your posts down as much as I can.
OK! OK!
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2001 at 4:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246280211
10 posts
Im still young, only a mere level 33 ranger, but at level 20 when my damage cap was removed, 2hs was doing a great amount more damage. nowadays though i cant seem to keep my fights up with 2 handers, and my one handers (especially now that double attack works almost 75% of the time) far outdamage it. I think that with age things change, and ive heard at level 52 all weapons get a +2 dmg bonus (stats on weap), which changes its ratio greatly for 1hands, but not so much with 2 hands.
▲ Page top
RE: OK! OK!
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2001 at 2:10 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591753934230
215 posts
Personally, I think it all has to do with what you have. I myself use a Wurmslayer and Kunzar Ku'juch as my two 1HS weapons, but I've got an Argent defender for 2HS. I'd have to say that the damage output is roughly equal, with a slight nod going to the AD. As far as the level 52 thing, I've heard the same things as well, but can't confirm it. After all, I'm still a few levels short. :)
▲ Page top
RE: OK! OK!
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 11:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247869278
32 posts
Also, I hear that 1hs is better for rangers to use. My ranger friend told me this, not sure why though. I myself use them both evenly, to max out the skill lvl.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 22 2001 at 12:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yeah, as I was thinking about the classes at the higher lvls a startling revelation came to me. I categorized each of the classes. Be aware this is my own opinion, and so you don't have to share it. Monks and Rogues- Damage dealers, Paladins, Shadowknights, Rangers-Support tanks, Clerics-buffers and healers, Druids and Shamans-buffers and support healers, Wizards-Nuking, Necomancers and Mages-Support nukers and support tanks (pets), Enchanters-support nukers and buffers, mostly mezzing though, and finally, Warriors, the masters of all weaponry and warfare-Rodeo clowns, their sole purpose at the high lvls, shout like an idiot at the mobs and get hit. A real shame I must say.
RE: A shame
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2001 at 2:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763939769
168 posts
Yes. At the high levels, you won't get far without everyone doing their part. That is ESPECIALLY true of warrior. Sure, the other classes may be great at what they can do to the uber-mobs. But the simple warrior buys all the other classes the one thing they need to do their voodoo... Time.

Hey, it's an idiotic game...

...but SOMEONE has to play it! ^_^

===========================================
Khemosaabe "SPAM" Longbow (of Cazic Thule server)
Lvl 51 Ranger and Slayer-of-Bunny-Wabbits
"I'm just a machine..."
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 12:16 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) When the link brought me here my first words were, and I quote, "Holy monkey." I think this is a great little toy to swing around. By the time you can get it, you may have something better, but the thing I always hear for warriors is, Ac is king for warriors. Well, this thing is a freakin' shield almost. And the damage is a few points away from the delay. Get a haste buff an avatar and death will follow that warrior around like a lost puppy.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 12:15 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) When the link brought me here my first words were, and I quote, "Holy monkey." I think this is a great little toy to swing around. By the time you can get it, you may have something better, but the thing I always hear for warriors is, Ac is king for warriors. Well, this thing is a freakin' shield almost. And the damage is a few points away from the delay. Get a haste buff an avatar and death will follow that warrior around like a lost puppy.

# Mar 07 2002 at 12:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757764283
17 posts
woah woah woah... correct me if im wrong but i dont think the sleeper hasnt been dropped yet and beings as ive heard he has somewhere in the billions in hit points i dont know if he ever will. but ne way no matter what way u look at it this loot is not junk, it is one of the best weapons out right now, i would drop ne other weapon(not including the ones better then this thing) in a heartbeat if i got this thing. like it says after the ratio, this thing is godly. i would love to see the stuff that makes this sword junk in your eyes.

Paladin of the 41 blessing of Rodcet Nife
Shuglin Fyreblade

QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2002 at 1:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760131119
View User Forum
330 posts
Aint never gunna be dropped. Ever. Wasn't ment to be killed and it's a VI's attempt to make a dynamic story line. So, once the warders are dead, that's it. The zone is forever changed and the sleeper is no more. I have heard rumors about a quest to trap 'em again but I think it's just more wishful thinking than anything.
▲ Page top
Low taunt on two handers...
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2001 at 10:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749811190
Sage
295 posts
The problem is if you're trying to tank as a warrior, you want to try to generate as much aggro as you can to get the mob to stick on you. Even a two-hander with a really good ratio like this one would have trouble doing that. It would need to have a really high-taunt proc to get things to stick on you, or be given resists so it could be an ideal "non-tanking" weapon.
▲ Page top
RE: Low taunt on two handers...
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2001 at 9:05 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592756508315
View User Forum
70 posts
I agree that the DMG ratio of this weapon would be good for taunt. But one thing that many people do not realize is the location to where u are in the fight. Most of the time if some one is closest to the mob the mob will attack them. I play a cleric/Druid/Necro. I did an experoment once. I charged into the bacttle and stood under the mob he immediatly turned on me and beat me down to 1 bub of health from FOH. There was nothing any one could do to change it. I rooted the mob prior to doing so I could back out heh. As a necro u notice this too when partnering with a mage. Your pet gets beat on a hell of alot more then the mages. It only due to your pet being closer to the mob! So all u tanks get in there close and rock it house.
▲ Page top
RE: Low taunt on two handers...
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2003 at 7:58 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788653851
52 posts
its called Proximity agro.

If a mob is rooted it will attack the closest person.

If it is not rooted it will not always but often attack the closest person with agro.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 10:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I would cry if I wasnt top on the list of merit for this drop. And would deffinately borrow it from whomever was! 2hs like this can out damage dual wield at times depending on the set up. Definately out cripple dual wield.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 10:41 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Bah nm I would just cry its no drop. /looks for his reading glasses
RE: nice
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2001 at 10:41 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755934571

Bah nm I would just cry its no drop. /looks for his reading glasses
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 10:36 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The way i look at this. The only time someone that could actualy GET this sword would want to use it, since they would most likely have to be level 60 and i doubt they'd be doing much for 1 group exp things....only time they'd use it is if they were a main tank on a big raid, but with 30 or 40 or 50 people arround depending where you are, someone with a swiftblade of 18 delay and another fast weapon offhand is gonna out taunt the guy usin this so the 30 AC on it is kinda wasted...
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 9:51 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I think it's funny to read these comments. Most of the people acting so nonchalant, saying "oh this sucks" etc., would crap their superman underoos if they had a chance to get one ;P
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 2:12 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Someones obviously pissed at people saying
RE: rut ro...
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2001 at 1:56 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I don't mean to go off on a rant here, but it's called Allakhazam is finally fed up with it. Fed up with people with brains the size of mummified walnuts spamming his boards with nothing but junk about "this is a monk item" or "druids get shafted again" and other such mindless drivel that makes the average player and reader of thses forums want to puke. From my personal observation, the worst whiners and beggars for anything and everything to be given to them on a silver platter are 90 percent of the time these same inane morons that obviously are too lazy to learn how to spell correctly, so they cover their inadequacies with symbols and numbers instead of letters, an even larger ego, and their favorite stack of **** rags that they use to pleasure themselves while waiting for the next big sucker to give them a freebie. I know I don't speak for people everywhere that are sick to death of the jerks and losers in the game, but if people would sit back and think for one second about how stupid they really look when posting spam and other such senseless crap, then maybe then boards like this wouldn't have to resort to such draconian measures.

Of course, that's just my opinion...
